---
title: "CV"
---

# CV

## Current position

**Senior Lecturer in Health Economics**  
Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle, Australia

## Education

- PhD in Economics, Ca' Foscari University of Venice
- MSc in Health Economics and Management, University of Bologna
- MA/MSc in Economics, Addis Ababa University
- BA in Economics, Jimma University

## Previous appointments

- Health Measurement and Regulatory Science Fellow, Duke University
- Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Auburn University
- Research Fellow, Health Economics Research Unit, University of Aberdeen
- Postdoctoral Research Fellow, Ca' Foscari University of Venice

## Download

Add your current CV as `assets/Mesfin_Genie_CV.pdf`, then link it here.
